description: M6.5 Q4 B2 origin gating: PTY + sensitive invoke commands restricted to local origins only. Remote-ANT webview content is explicitly DENIED. Current JS-facing surface: configcmd::save_desktop_config (T2d-2a wizard JSON write). PTY remains Rust-internal. Capability config gates any future JS-facing commands. E2 (2026-05-23): ant-router sidecar spawn permission (Rust-initiated; webview cannot trigger).
